title: EvaluateResponse
description: Wire response returned by POST /v1-evaluate. Emitted by atlasent-api/supabase/functions/v1-evaluate/handler.ts. A non-allow decision is NOT an HTTP error; it is a 200 response with decision != 'allow' and (typically) a populated `denial` block.

decision.description: Canonical four-value decision. SDKs MUST handle all four (legacy SDKs that only branched on allow|deny may surface hold/escalate as an error to the caller until they're updated).

permit_token.description: Opaque permit identifier (raw UUID). Present iff decision == 'allow'. Passed back to POST /v1-verify-permit as `permit_token`.

request_id.description: Server-side request identifier. Used as audit deep-link and idempotency key for replays.

expires_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp at which the permit expires. Default TTL: 1 hour.

denial.description: Populated on non-allow decisions. Contains the policy-engine reason and a stable code.

mode.description: Evaluation mode. 'shadow' indicates no permit was minted (request had `shadow: true`).

decisionObject.description: Canonical Decision Object (CDO) — full structured decision record. Optional; absent on shorter responses.
